title: Visit landing page and enter the app
description: A prospect can watch the landing page demo experience and proceed into the dashboard entry point.

steps.description: Click the primary call to action to get started

title: Get started from the landing page
description: A visitor can use the landing page entry point to reach the app dashboard.

steps.description: Click the primary get started entry point
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: View dashboard overview metrics and activity
description: A user can open the dashboard and review the key performance cards, charts, and recent activity summary.

steps.description: Verify lead metric cards are displayed
Verify recent activity entries are displayed

title: Move a deal to the next pipeline stage
description: A user can move a deal card forward in the pipeline and see it appear in the next stage column.

steps.description: Move a deal card to the next stage
Verify the card is displayed in the updated stage column

title: Search and filter leads
description: A sales ops user can narrow the leads repository by search term and status and see matching leads.

steps.description: Enter a search term into the leads search field
Verify the matching leads list is displayed

title: View landing storytelling and open the demo overlay
description: A visitor can scroll the landing page, open the demo walkthrough overlay, close it, and continue into the app.

steps.description: Verify the demo overlay is displayed
Verify the demo overlay is no longer displayed

title: Import leads with AI diagnostics
description: A sales ops user can start the CSV import flow and see new leads added to the repository after diagnostics run.

steps.description: Verify newly imported leads are displayed in the repository

title: Inspect dashboard chart details
description: A user can hover dashboard chart points and see more detailed values for the selected data.

steps.description: Verify detailed chart values are displayed

title: Compare monthly and annual pricing
description: A visitor can switch billing frequency on the pricing page and see the plan prices update.

steps.description: Switch the billing frequency to annual
Verify the pricing values update for annual billing
Switch the billing frequency back to monthly
Verify the pricing values update for monthly billing

title: Update AI representative settings and save
description: An admin can change the AI representative identity and outreach settings and see the updated configuration persist in the settings view.

steps.description: Enter a new AI representative name
Verify the updated configuration is displayed

title: Save CRM and OpenAI credentials
description: An admin can enter CRM and OpenAI API keys and see them stored in settings after saving.

steps.description: Verify the saved credentials are displayed in settings

title: Watch the demo overlay from the landing page
description: A visitor can open the landing page demo walkthrough overlay from the marketing page.

steps.description: Verify the demo overlay is displayed

title: Compare monthly and annual pricing and expand FAQs
description: A visitor can switch pricing billing cadence and expand FAQs to compare plans before deciding.

steps.description: Verify pricing options for both billing views are displayed

title: Expand pricing FAQs
description: A visitor can open a pricing FAQ item and read its answer.

steps.description: Verify the FAQ answer is displayed

title: Move a deal back to a previous pipeline stage
description: A user can move a deal card backward in the pipeline and see it return to an earlier stage column.

steps.description: Move a deal card to the previous stage
Verify the card is displayed in the earlier stage column

title: Review multiple pricing FAQs
description: A visitor can expand more than one FAQ item on the pricing page to compare answers.

steps.description: Verify multiple FAQ answers are displayed

title: Show empty results for no-match search
description: A sales ops user who searches for nothing should see an empty filtered results state in the leads repository.

steps.description: Enter a search term that matches no leads
Verify an empty results state is displayed
